news_items.headline: MLB wants max 5 years for FAs changing teams
news_items.summary: As part of the next CBA with players, MLB wants a maximum contract length of 5 years for free agents who are switching teams, while organizations will have the ability to keep their own players for up to 6 years, calling it a Cornerstone Player Provision.

news_items.headline: MLBPA proposes ban on prop betting, source says
news_items.summary: As part of ongoing CBA talks with MLB, the MLBPA has proposed a ban on prop betting on individual players to help combat harassment from disgruntled gamblers, a union source told ESPN.

news_items.headline: Hoyer: Urgency for Peterson trade amid injuries
news_items.summary: The Cubs acquired veteran left-hander David Peterson from the Mets for a simple reason: They need healthy starting pitchers.

news_items.headline: D-backs activate Kepler after 80-game PED ban
news_items.summary: The Diamondbacks activated outfielder Max Kepler from the restricted list Thursday following his completion of an 80-game suspension for testing positive for a performance-enhancing drug.

news_items.headline: Rays' combined no-hitter broken up in 9th vs. KC
news_items.summary: Three Rays pitchers lost their combined no-hitter against the Royals when Carter Jensen hit a two-run homer off Craig Kimbrel in the ninth inning Thursday.

news_items.headline: Seager rejoins Rangers after concussion IL stint
news_items.summary: Rangers shortstop Corey Seager was activated from the concussion list Thursday, while Cody Freeman was placed on the 10-day injured list with a herniated disk.

news_items.headline: ⚾ Biggest strengths for top playoff contenders
news_items.summary: For clubs currently leading the postseason hunt, here's the one thing driving their success so far.

news_items.headline: Mets swept at home by Cubs after 4-3 loss in 10 innings
news_items.summary: The Mets lost for the sixth straight game on Thursday night, losing 4-3 in extra innings to get swept by the Chicago Cubs in a four-game series at Citi Field.
